skills.name: weather
skills.description: Fetch current weather for any city using wttr.in (no API key needed).
skills.trigger_conditions: weather, temperature, forecast, rain, sun, humidity, what is the weather
skills.author: vantis-marketplace
skills.code:
import sys, urllib.request, json
city = ' '.join(sys.argv[1:]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'London'
url = f'https://wttr.in/{city.replace(" ", "+")}?format=j1'
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=10) as r:
        data = json.load(r)
    cur = data['current_condition'][0]
    print(json.dumps({
        'city': city,
        'temp_c': cur['temp_C'],
        'feels_like_c': cur['FeelsLikeC'],
        'desc': cur['weatherDesc'][0]['value'],
        'humidity': cur['humidity'],
        'wind_kmph': cur['windspeedKmph'],
    }))
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'error': str(e)}))

skills.name: web_scraper
skills.description: Fetch and extract plain text from any public URL.
skills.trigger_conditions: scrape, fetch page, read url, get content from, extract text from website
skills.author: vantis-marketplace
skills.code:
import sys, urllib.request, re, json
url = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'https://example.com'
try:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 VANTIS/1.0'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) as r:
        html = r.read().decode(errors='replace')
    # Strip scripts/styles/tags
    html = re.sub(r'<(script|style)[^>]*>.*?</\1>', '', html, flags=re.DOTALL|re.IGNORECASE)
    text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', html)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()[:4000]
    print(json.dumps({'url': url, 'text': text}))
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'error': str(e)}))

skills.name: rss_reader
skills.description: Fetch and parse an RSS/Atom feed, returning latest 10 items.
skills.trigger_conditions: rss, feed, news, articles, headlines, blog posts
skills.author: vantis-marketplace
skills.code:
import sys, urllib.request, re, json
url = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'https://hnrss.org/frontpage'
try:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'VANTIS/1.0'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
        xml = r.read().decode(errors='replace')
    items = []
    for item in re.findall(r'<item>(.*?)</item>', xml, re.DOTALL)[:10]:
        title = re.search(r'<title[^>]*><!\[CDATA\[(.+?)\]\]>', item) or re.search(r'<title[^>]*>([^<]+)<', item)
        link = re.search(r'<link[^>]*>([^<]+)<', item)
        desc = re.search(r'<description[^>]*><!\[CDATA\[(.+?)\]\]>', item, re.DOTALL) or re.search(r'<description[^>]*>([^<]+)<', item, re.DOTALL)
        items.append({
            'title': title.group(1).strip() if title else '',
            'link': link.group(1).strip() if link else '',
            'desc': re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', desc.group(1)).strip()[:300] if desc else ''
        })
    print(json.dumps({'feed': url, 'items': items}))
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'error': str(e)}))

skills.name: url_health_check
skills.description: Check HTTP status codes and response times for one or more URLs.
skills.trigger_conditions: health check, is it up, url check, http status, ping website, site down
skills.author: vantis-marketplace
skills.code:
import sys, urllib.request, time, json
urls = sys.argv[1:] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ['https://google.com']
results = []
for url in urls:
    start = time.monotonic()
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'VANTIS/1.0'})
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
            status = r.status
            ms = round((time.monotonic() - start) * 1000)
            results.append({'url': url, 'status': status, 'ms': ms, 'ok': 200 <= status < 400})
    except Exception as e:
        ms = round((time.monotonic() - start) * 1000)
        results.append({'url': url, 'status': None, 'ms': ms, 'ok': False, 'error': str(e)})
print(json.dumps({'checks': results}))

skills.name: notes_manager
skills.description: Simple persistent note-taking: add, list, or search notes stored in a local JSON file.
skills.trigger_conditions: note, notes, reminder, write down, remember this, save note, list notes
skills.author: vantis-marketplace
skills.code:
import sys, json, os, datetime
path = os.path.expanduser('~/.vantis_notes.json')
def load():
    if os.path.exists(path):
        with open(path) as f: return json.load(f)
    return []
def save(notes):
    with open(path, 'w') as f: json.dump(notes, f)
notes = load()
cmd = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'list'
if cmd == 'add':
    text = ' '.join(sys.argv[2:])
    notes.append({'id': len(notes)+1, 'text': text, 'at': datetime.datetime.now().isoformat()})
    save(notes)
    print(json.dumps({'added': text, 'total': len(notes)}))
elif cmd == 'search':
    q = ' '.join(sys.argv[2:]).lower()
    found = [n for n in notes if q in n['text'].lower()]
    print(json.dumps({'results': found}))
elif cmd == 'clear':
    save([])
    print(json.dumps({'cleared': True}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'notes': notes[-20:]}))
